dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Is there nothing you can do...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Then should we sing "that song" first?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: that would only backfire on us. &
